questions.question: What is the name of the wizarding school in the Harry Potter series?
Identify the book: "It was the best of times, it was the worst of times"
questions.answer: A Tale of Two Cities by Charles Dickens

questions.question: Identify the book: "It is a truth universally acknowledged, that a single man in possession of a good fortune, must be in want of a wife."
questions.answer: Pride and Prejudice by Jane Austen

questions.question: Identify the book: "All happy families are alike; each unhappy family is unhappy in its own way."
Identify the book: "In a hole in the ground there lived a hobbit."
Identify the book: "It was a bright cold day in April, and the clocks were striking thirteen."
Identify the book: "Mr. and Mrs. Dursley, of number four, Privet Drive, were proud to say that they were perfectly normal, thank you very much."
questions.answer: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone by J.K. Rowling

questions.question: Identify the author: The Great Gatsby
Identify the book: "You don't know about me without you have read a book by the name of The Adventures of Tom Sawyer"
questions.answer: Adventures of Huckleberry Finn by Mark Twain

questions.question: Identify the book: "So we beat on, boats against the current, borne back ceaselessly into the past."
questions.answer: The Great Gatsby by F. Scott Fitzgerald

questions.question: Who wrote 'The Autobiography of Benjamin Franklin'?
Who wrote 'Essays' included in the Harvard Classics?
Who wrote the poems included in the Harvard Classics, known for 'Auld Lang Syne'?
Who wrote 'Novum Organum' and essays in the Harvard Classics?
Who wrote 'Tartuffe' and other plays in the Harvard Classics?
Who wrote 'Two Years Before the Mast'?
Who wrote the tragedy 'Electra' (there are versions by multiple playwrights - name one)?
Who wrote the tragedy 'Seven Against Thebes'?
Who wrote the the line "what a web we weave when first we practice to deceive"?
questions.answer: Sir Walter Scott in his book 'Marmion'
